<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>bilateral parasagittal parieto-occipital polymicrogyria（99.5%）</li>
<li>insomnia (disease)（99.5%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis（99.4%）</li>
<li>endogenous depression（99.4%）</li>
<li>axial spondylometaphyseal dysplasia（99.2%）</li>
<li>monomelic amyotrophy（99.2%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, susceptibility to（99.2%）</li>
<li>lower motor neuron syndrome with late-adult onset（99.2%）</li>
<li>Mills syndrome（99.2%）</li>
<li>amyotrohpic lateral sclerosis type 22（99.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
